command: src=open('ic_part_src/order_mapper.py','r',encoding='utf-8').read(); ok=('for _scan_letter in _COL_LETTERS:' in src) and ('for _col_letter in _COL_LETTERS:' not in src) and ('def _col_letter(n: int) -> str:' in src); print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')

then.description: 루프 변수 _col_letter가 _scan_letter로 rename되었고 함수 def는 보존됨

command: src=open('ic_part_src/order_mapper.py','r',encoding='utf-8').read(); ok=all(c in src for c in ['_col_letter(col_idx)','_col_letter(ICPART_COL_DELIVERY_DATE)','_col_letter(ICPART_COL_FOLDER_DATE)']); print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')

then.description: 루프 블록 외부의 _col_letter(...) 호출부 3곳이 모두 보존됨 (과수정 없음)

command: src=open('ic_part_src/order_mapper.py','r',encoding='utf-8').read(); ok=src.count('for _scan_letter in _COL_LETTERS:') == 1; print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')
